attributes.__structure__:
ATTRS:
  description: "Water draws on Uheln\xE1 locality"
  VERSION: 0.0.0
COORDS:
  date:
    name: date
    coords:
    - date
    unit:
      tick: h
      tz: UTC
      dayfirst: false
      yearfirst: true
    type: datetime64[h]
    na_value: null
    description: Time coordinate
    df_col: date
    source_unit:
      tick: h
      tz: CET
      dayfirst: false
      yearfirst: true
    range: null
    composed:
    - date
    chunk_size: 1024
    step_limits:
    - 1
    - 1
    - molar
    sorted: true
  well_id:
    name: well_id
    coords:
    - well_id
    unit: null
    type: str[16]
    na_value: "\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\
      \uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF"
    description: "Draw well id. (just single well for Uheln\xE1 locality)"
    df_col: well_id
    source_unit: null
    range: null
    composed:
    - well_id
    chunk_size: 1
    step_limits: any_new
    sorted: []
VARS:
  cum_draw:
    name: cum_draw
    coords:
    - date
    - well_id
    unit: meter ** 3
    type: float64
    na_value: .nan
    description: Total water draw per month.
    df_col: cum_draw
    source_unit: meter ** 3
    range: null
